title: Melted Arabian Kabanos Kebabs
description: Resinous, cheese-pull, sick-day Saudi-Arabian dish featuring vegetarian kabanos, yuzu-cured cheese, and a lacto-vegetarian-friendly punch of herbs.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the kabanos with a little olive oil and season with salt, pepper, cumin, and paprika.
Skewer the sausage pieces alternately with halloumi and feta, inserting them into the skewer before placing on the grill.
Grill the skewers for 3 to 4 minutes on each side until the sausages are browned and the halloumi has melted.
Brush the grilled skewers with yuzu juice and zesty aroma from yuzu zest during the last minute of cooking.
Remove from heat and let rest for 2 minutes to allow cheese to set slightly.
Sprinkle chopped parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice over the kebabs before serving.
Serve hot as a comforting, melt-in-your-mouth lunch.
